name: Session Fixation
description: The application authenticates a user or otherwise establishes a new user session without invalidating any existing session identifier, giving an attacker the opportunity to fix a known session ID and then hijack the authenticated session.
detection_pattern: AUTH[login] node authenticates a user and transitions to an authenticated context but does not flow through a CONTROL node that invalidates or regenerates the session identifier in STORAGE[session] before granting access, allowing a pre-existing session ID to persist
